name: Forest Dusk
description: Earthy greens and warm amber tones - seamlessly adapts to light and dark modes.

preview.sampleText: Where nature meets technology with adaptive light and dark modes.

classes.a: text-lime-700 dark:text-lime-400 hover:text-lime-800 dark:hover:text-lime-300 underline decoration-lime-600/40 hover:decoration-lime-600
classes.td: border border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-600 p-3 text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-300
classes.th: border border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-600 p-3 bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 font-bold text-stone-800 dark:text-lime-400
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-lime-600 dark:border-lime-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 bg-stone-50 dark:bg-stone-800/40 py-3 pr-4 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 px-2 py-1 rounded font-mono text-sm text-lime-800 dark:text-lime-400
classes.pre: bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto border border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-700 my-4
